title: Inspo Museum
lede: A recovered dossier of stills, posters, and fragments — the worlds that taught this archive how to look like lost data.

exhibits.title: Amber hive fields
exhibits.note: Monochrome amber haze — depth through dust, not saturation.

exhibits.title: Teal streets / amber dunes
exhibits.note: Cool noir against warm desolation — two temperatures, one archive.

exhibits.title: Rain neon skyline
exhibits.note: Lived-in future — dense greebles, wet streets, diegetic glow.

exhibits.title: CRT night desk
exhibits.note: Exhaustion at the terminal — a life lived in the glow of screens.

exhibits.title: Terminal scrapbook
exhibits.note: HUD debris and phosphor icons — found data, not polished UI.

exhibits.title: Gravity well dossier
exhibits.note: Technical diagrams as poetry — archive as navigation chart.

exhibits.title: Neo-Tokyo dossier
exhibits.note: Monochrome-on-black panels — grain, modules, recovered print.

exhibits.title: New Tokyo archive
exhibits.note: Red-on-black dossier — distressed print, manga panels, recovered scrapbook.

exhibits.title: Rebirth / Neo Tokyo
exhibits.note: Singularity over the city — grid, wireframes, the end as beginning.

exhibits.title: Amber headlights
exhibits.note: Warm bloom against cold road streaks — motion as archive.

exhibits.title: Highway POV chase
exhibits.note: Dash readout + neon canyon — speed as digital footprint.

exhibits.title: Wireframe touch
exhibits.note: Digital hand meeting flesh — the archive reaching back.

exhibits.title: Crew dossier
exhibits.note: Color-coded panels on charcoal — museum as character file.

exhibits.title: See you, space cowboy
exhibits.note: Halftone amber profile — desaturated color blocking as age.

exhibits.title: Table hustle
exhibits.note: Analog artifact in the digital stack — grit, gold, teal felt.
